# ElicitationForm.UserBindingFailure enumeration

The reason a URL-mode user-binding check fails (spec §20.7).

```csharp
public enum UserBindingFailure
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| None | `0` | No failure (success). |
| SubjectMismatch | `1` | The two sessions resolve to different subjects ⇒ reject (R-20.7-m). |
| UnverifiedIdentity | `2` | A subject was missing or client-provided-only ⇒ cannot verify (R-20.7-j, R-20.7-k). |
